# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

# config/initializers/sendgrid.rb
if Rails.env.production?
  ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings = {
    address: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_SMTP_ADDRESS", "smtp.sendgrid.net"),
    port: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_SMTP_PORT", 587).to_i,
    domain: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_DOMAIN", "localhost"),
    user_name: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_USERNAME", "apikey"),
    password: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_API_KEY"),
    authentication: :plain,
    enable_starttls_auto: true
  }

  ActionMailer::Base.delivery_method = :smtp
  ActionMailer::Base.perform_deliveries = true
  ActionMailer::Base.raise_delivery_errors = true
else
  ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings = {
    address: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_SMTP_ADDRESS", "smtp.sendgrid.net"),
    port: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_SMTP_PORT", 587).to_i,
    domain: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_DOMAIN", "localhost"),
    user_name: ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_USERNAME", "apikey"),
    password: ENV["SENDGRID_API_KEY"],
    authentication: :plain,
    enable_starttls_auto: true
  }

  ActionMailer::Base.delivery_method = ENV["SENDGRID_API_KEY"].present? ? :smtp : :test
  ActionMailer::Base.perform_deliveries = true
  ActionMailer::Base.raise_delivery_errors = true
end

# app/mailers/application_mailer.rb
class ApplicationMailer < ActionMailer::Base
  default from: ENV.fetch("DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL", "no-reply@example.com")
  layout "mailer"
end

# app/mailers/sendgrid_mailer.rb
class SendgridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  def deliver_email(to:, subject:, html_body: nil, text_body: nil, from: nil)
    @html_body = html_body
    @text_body = text_body

    mail(
      to: to,
      from: from || default_params[:from],
      subject: subject
    ) do |format|
      format.text { render plain: @text_body || ActionView::Base.full_sanitizer.sanitize(@html_body.to_s) }
      format.html { render html: @html_body.to_s.html_safe } if @html_body.present?
    end
  end
end

# app/views/sendgrid_mailer/deliver_email.text.erb
<%= @text_body || ActionView::Base.full_sanitizer.sanitize(@html_body.to_s) %>

# app/views/sendgrid_mailer/deliver_email.html.erb
<%= @html_body.to_s.html_safe %>

# config/environments/development.rb
Rails.application.configure do
  config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
  config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = true
  config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: ENV.fetch("APP_HOST", "localhost"), port: ENV.fetch("APP_PORT", 3000) }
end

# config/environments/production.rb
Rails.application.configure do
  config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
  config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = true
  config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: ENV.fetch("APP_HOST") }
end

# example usage
SendgridMailer.deliver_email(
  to: "user@example.com",
  subject: "Welcome",
  html_body: "<h1>Hello</h1><p>Welcome to our app.</p>",
  text_body: "Hello\n\nWelcome to our app."
).deliver_later
